content: Self-Refine's iterative un-supervised refinement framework can be adapted to fix the core limitation of existing multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, which often struggle to consolidate conflicting perspectives into a coherent improved output without external supervision. This creates a new hybrid self-reflection system where Self-Refine's iterative feedback loop turns inconsistent divergent perspectives from multi-perspective reflection into a progressively refined output entirely through the LLM's own self-feedback.
